Line.Description: Eligible classroom-supply purchases total $415.29, which exceeds the $300 statutory educator-expense cap, so the allowed deduction is $300. The remaining line items are coaching (cross-country) and plainly personal spend that Callum logged for review; they are not classroom expenses and are excluded from the educator deduction.
